key.name: startup-action
key.description: What to do when the application starts. Possible values: 'nothing', 'restore', 'connect-recent', 'connect-specific'.

key.name: most-recent-config-id
key.description: The D-Bus object path of the most recently used VPN configuration.

key.name: most-recent-config-name
key.description: The display name of the most recently used VPN configuration.

key.name: specific-config-path
key.description: The D-Bus object path of the configuration to connect to on startup when startup-action is 'connect-specific'.

key.name: show-notifications
key.description: Whether to show desktop notifications for VPN status changes.

key.name: tooltip-refresh-interval
key.description: How often (in seconds) the tray tooltip is refreshed to update the connected-duration display. Range: 10–300.

key.name: connection-timeout
key.description: How long to wait (in seconds) before notifying the user that a VPN connection is still pending. Range: 5–300.

key.name: health-check-stall-seconds
key.description: How long (in seconds) a connected session must show zero traffic before being flagged as idle in the tray menu. Set to 0 to disable. Range: 0–600.
